assertions.title: Stream content color coding

steps.action: Open /WEA/dashboard in a dedicated browser session and inspect expanded agent cards
steps.expected: Expanded cards show stream rows for reasoning, tool calls ($-prefixed), tool results (indented), and errors for color verification
steps.observed: Expanded cards showed header + metadata only (e.g., role/adapter) with no stream rows rendered.

steps.action: Expand additional collapsed card (Error Executive) and re-audit expanded blocks
steps.expected: Expanded card includes stream content types that can be style-audited
steps.observed: After expansion, two cards were expanded but both still lacked stream header and stream line patterns ($ prefix, reasoning lines, indented tool results).

steps.action: Collect API evidence for dashboard/live-run data availability
steps.expected: Data surface provides stream-bearing content to validate dashboard stream color coding
steps.observed: GET /api/companies/{companyId}/live-runs?minCount=8 returned succeeded run metadata only (no stream payload), and dashboard remained without stream content during inspection.

evidence.network: Browser network captured repeated GET polling for /api/companies/{companyId}/live-runs?minCount=8 and /api/health; curl status checks confirmed 200 for /api/health, /api/companies/{companyId}/live-runs?minCount=8, and /api/companies/{companyId}/dashboard.

assertions.issues: Blocked: stream content required for color-coding validation is absent in expanded dashboard cards under current read-only fixture state; therefore reasoning/tool call/tool result/error color assertions cannot be executed.

frictions.description: Dashboard network polling generated large request logs, requiring focused DOM/API audits to isolate assertion-specific evidence.
frictions.resolution: Used targeted DOM audits and explicit API captures for live-runs and dashboard summary alongside screenshots.

blockers.description: Expanded dashboard cards did not expose any stream transcript lines, so contract-required color types (reasoning/tool_call/tool_result/error) were unavailable for style verification.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Expanded additional collapsed card (Error Executive), repeated DOM stream audits, and captured live-runs/dashboard API data; stream content remained absent.

summary: Tested 1 assertion: 0 passed, 0 failed, 1 blocked (VAL-GUI-DASH-007 blocked because no stream content was available in expanded dashboard cards to validate required color coding).
